extracted_from: The sub-funds are registered for distribution to professional investors only in Ireland.
extraction_notes: The document primarily describes a UK-domiciled 'Trojan Fund' (UK UCITS, base currency £ Sterling, ISINs starting with GB). While it mentions that 'sub-funds are registered for distribution to professional investors only in Ireland', it does not provide specific details (display name, base currency, inception date, legal structure, domicile) for the target fund 'Trojan Fund (Ireland)' (ISIN IE00B6T42S66).
